content.text:
Ugg. Caveman talk. Good.

First check gstack is installed like project say.

```bash
test -d ~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin && echo "GSTACK_OK" || echo "GSTACK_MISSING"
```

GSTACK_OK. Good. Caveman happy.

Now what warmup need? Look project files.

```bash
ls -la /home/aryaniyaps/web-projects/portfolio
```

See files:
- CLAUDE.md (modified)
- .gitignore (untracked)
- Git repo with recent commits

Caveman think warmup done. Project ready. Gstack work.
